Overlooking the gorgeous Brazilian Emerald Coast, this resort features beautiful sea views and a private island for guests. It offers a pool with panoramic deck, gym, spa, restaurant and several activities. Wi-Fi is free.
Activities include helicopter tours, snorkeling classes, hiking and kayaking. There are electric cars for guests to move around Awasi Santa Catarina. Those staying indoors can enjoy a selection of 300 DVDs to watch.
Featuring a balcony with stunning sea views, units at Awasi Santa Catarina Exclusive Resort come with air conditioning, an LCD TV, DVD player, spacious living area, minibar and telephone. Some units have a mini wine cellar, Nespresso coffee machine and a hammock.
